ew_context: Price rejecting key Fibonacci resistance in what appears to be corrective wave 2, with wave 3 decline targeting significant support levels
pattern_desc: Rejection at 61.8% Fibonacci bounce level with momentum aligned bearish flow. EMA bearish configuration confirms downtrend resumption
invalidation: Sustained break above 86.18 stop loss negates the Fibonacci rejection and bearish structure
market_context: Silver weakness following broader precious metals decline. Industrial demand concerns weigh on silver vs gold. Momentum aligned bearish flow confirms distribution
